'''Genna Delpin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]], where she was considered a rising star in the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] military. She led the assault fleet at the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]].

==Biography==
She took the post of [[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force|Supreme Commander]] of the Corellian military when [[Dur Gejjen]] forcibly removed [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] from the post. She was later in charge of firing [[Centerpoint Station]] when it destroyed the Alliance Second Fleet and would later form an alliance with [[Denjax Teppler]] following the death of [[Sadras Koyan]]. Teppler later became co-Chief of State of Corellia.

{{Char-stub}}
